zh.homeIntro1: 《回到未来》（Back to the Future）是由罗伯特·泽米吉斯执导、鲍勃·盖尔编剧的科幻电影三部曲（1985、1989、1990）。影片讲述了少年马蒂·麦克弗莱乘坐布朗博士发明的时光机（改装自DeLorean跑车）穿越时空的冒险故事。
zh.homeIntro2: 其中第二部（1989年上映）将故事带到了2015年10月21日的「未来世界」。编剧在1980年代末期想象了26年后的日常生活，涉及通信、交通、娱乐、支付、穿戴设备等多个领域。这些场景在当年只是科幻想象，但如今许多已成为现实。
zh.homeIntro3: 本站收录了《回到未来II》中对2015年的16条科技预测，逐一与现实对照验证。从已实现的视频通话和平板电视，到仍属幻想的飞行汽车，再到令人惊叹的「小熊队夺冠」预言——这部35年前的电影对未来的想象力令人叹服。
zh.coreQuote: 「Roads? Where we're going, we don't need roads.（路？我们要去的地方不需要路。）」—— 布朗博士
keyPointsList: 1985年 —— 第一部上映，建立时光旅行世界观
1989年 —— 第二部上映，描绘2015年未来世界
1990年 —— 第三部上映，三部曲完结
2015年10月21日 —— 电影中马蒂抵达「未来」的日期，全球庆祝「回到未来日」
2016年 —— 芝加哥小熊队时隔108年夺得世界大赛冠军，与电影预言惊人吻合
sourceList: 预言内容来自电影《回到未来II》（1989）的场景画面和对白（Wikipedia）
验证评价基于公开新闻报道、产品发布记录和统计数据
编者观点不代表学术定论
站点图标采用闪电时钟符号——DeLorean时光机需要1.21吉瓦的闪电能量来穿越时空，时钟代表时间旅行的核心主题

en.homeTitle: What is Back to the Future?
en.homeIntro1: Back to the Future is a sci-fi film trilogy (1985, 1989, 1990) directed by Robert Zemeckis and written by Bob Gale. The films follow teenager Marty McFly as he travels through time in a DeLorean time machine invented by Dr. Emmett "Doc" Brown.
en.homeIntro2: Part II (released 1989) takes the story to October 21, 2015 — a "future world" imagined from the perspective of the late 1980s. The filmmakers envisioned everyday life 26 years ahead, spanning communications, transportation, entertainment, payments, and wearable technology. What was pure sci-fi fantasy then has, in many cases, become reality.
en.homeIntro3: This site archives 16 technology predictions from Back to the Future Part II's depiction of 2015, verified against real-world outcomes. From video calling and flat-screen TVs that came true, to flying cars that remain fantasy, to the astonishing Cubs World Series prediction — the film's 35-year-old vision of the future remains remarkably impressive.
en.coreQuote: "Roads? Where we're going, we don't need roads." — Doc Brown
keyPointsList: 1985 —— First film released, establishing the time travel universe
1989 —— Part II released, depicting life in 2015
1990 —— Part III released, completing the trilogy
October 21, 2015 —— The date Marty arrives in the 'future'; celebrated worldwide as Back to the Future Day
2016 —— Chicago Cubs win World Series after 108 years, eerily matching the film's prediction
sourceList: Predictions sourced from scenes and dialogue in Back to the Future Part II (1989) (Wikipedia)
Verification based on public news reports, product launches, and statistical data
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus
Site icon: lightning clock symbol — the DeLorean time machine requires 1.21 gigawatts of lightning to travel through time, and the clock represents the core theme of time travel
